subject: Cumulative and Survival Distribution Functions
question: Let $X$ be a random variable with the following cumulative distribution function: $F(x) = \begin{cases} 0 & x < 0 \\ x^2 & 0\le x < 1 \\ \alpha & x = 1 \\ 1-2^{-2x} & x > 1 \end{cases}$ (a) Find $\Pr(X > \frac{3}{2})$. (b) Find $\Pr(\frac{1}{4} < X\le \frac{3}{4})$. (c) Find $\alpha$. (d) Find $\Pr(X = \frac{1}{2})$. (e) Sketch the graph of $F(x)$.
